title: Protein extraction from Rice bran
author: Siwongsa, Suriphon
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Rice bran is a by-product of the rice milling process, which is classified as a waste. However, there has been research done earlier; found that rice bran contains a massive number of proteins when compared to other plants. The extraction of plant proteins using cellulase enzymes is considered because the great nutrition is revealed, in which there is a comparison of extraction in many circumstances to get the best conditions.
steps_raw: Rice bran is a by-product of the rice milling process, which is classified as a waste.
